Related Entities

  • hospital OPELOUSAS GENERAL HEALTH SYSTEM 3-star overall rating
  • hospital ACADIAN MEDICAL CENTER 2-star overall rating
  • hospital OCEANS BEHAVIORAL HOSPITAL OF OPELOUSAS
  • snf Senior Village Nursing & Rehabilitation Center 3-star, 150 beds
  • snf HERITAGE MANOR OF OPELOUSAS 2-star, 109 beds
  • snf OUR LADY OF PROMPT SUCCOR NURSING FACILITY 4-star, 120 beds
  • snf J. MICHAEL MORROW MEMORIAL NURSING HOME 3-star, 175 beds
  • snf EUNICE MANOR 4-star, 152 beds
  • snf TRI-COMMUNITY NURSING CENTER 4-star, 108 beds
  • snf OAK LANE WELLNESS & REHABILITATIVE CENTER 2-star, 130 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
